description: Tic-tac-toe CAPTCHA boards are generated by enumerating valid X-to-move positions and selecting boards with exactly one accepted win-now or block-now move. No raster image files are used.
challenge_randomization: The server regenerates the current challenge on each /state request and after failed submissions. Explicit seeds remain only as a developer debugging hook.
notes: Ground truth records the board, objective, solution cell, solved board, and immediate-move validation output.
